# Ringing Triangle

## Observed Text

- Retain your Hand on the first turn of combat.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- First-turn retain improves setup consistency for expensive or competing powers/attacks; value it higher when the deck often draws more key cards than it can play on turn 1.
